name_en: New Small Dior Bucket Bag in Stock!!️
name_cn:
New Small Dior Bucket Bag in Stock!!️
Latest C'est Series from the Boutique, elegant and classic, blue Oblique Monogram fabric, unique bucket bag silhouette, letter Lock closure, adorned with a turn-lock letter D, fits various daily essentials, comes with top handle and adjustable strap, detachable chain shoulder strap, stylish and versatile
size:17*7*18cm
9279
